velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Create test cases for data accuracy
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals (CI/CD, test cases, data accuracy, documentation) with no velocity signals present.
domain_risk_quote: secure multi-cloud platform for content security and governance
domain_risk_reasoning: Content governance and security are business-critical but lack explicit financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language indicating high risk.
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Named tools (dbt, BigQuery, CI/CD) appear in responsibilities suggesting existing infrastructure being improved and extended rather than built from zero.
jd_authorship_quote: Develop dbt semantic layer architecture; Collaborate across departments on data strategy
jd_authorship_reasoning: Specific technical responsibilities (dbt semantic layer, transformation pipelines, CI/CD) mixed with generic boilerplate (collaborate, document).
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The bulk of responsibilities focus on building data infrastructure and semantic layers for consumption by other data consumers rather than external business or GTM stakeholders.
autonomy_level_quote: Create test cases for data accuracy
autonomy_level_reasoning: The responsibilities are focused on delivering specific technical outputs and managing defined processes within scope rather than setting overall direction or strategy.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design and build data transformation pipelines; Address data quality issues
ai_role_reasoning: Semantic layer infrastructure enables AI consumption (text-to-SQL, GenAI patterns).
testing_framing_quote: Create test cases for data accuracy
testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate owns quality practice through explicit test case creation.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: secure multi-cloud platform for content security and governance
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Governance and security dominance signals compliance/trust-driven framing over operational reliability.
